title: double select_with_fee call invariant not documented
description: payment.rs calls select_with_fee(&all_notes, amount_zatoshi) to get selected_ids for mark_note_spent, then passes all_notes to build_shielded_tx which calls select_with_fee again internally. The comment explains why all_notes is passed (standalone correctness) but does not state the safety invariant: 'both calls receive the same all_notes slice and amount_zatoshi, and select_with_fee is deterministic (FIFO by block_height), therefore both calls produce identical selected_notes.' Without this invariant documented, a contributor who caches or filters all_notes before the second call will silently mark the wrong notes spent. Add a // INVARIANT comment at the pre-selection step.
